# Second Turn Games

> Every game deserves a second turn.

Second Turn Games is a peer-to-peer marketplace for pre-loved board games in the Baltic region (Latvia, Lithuania, Estonia).

## What We Do

Buyers and sellers trade used board games at fair prices. Every listing includes condition grading, seller photos, and ships via parcel locker networks across all three Baltic countries.

## How It Works

- **Browse games** at /browse — filter by condition, price, player count, country, categories, and mechanics
- **Search games** at /browse?q={query} — text search by game name
- **Listing pages** at /listings/{id} — individual game listings with price, condition, photos, seller info, and shipping options
- **Wanted listings** at /wanted — buyers post what games they're looking for
- **Seller profiles** at /sellers/{id} — seller ratings, trust badges, active listings, and game shelf

## Pricing

All prices are in EUR. Buyers pay item price + shipping only (no service fee). Shipping is via Unisend parcel lockers across Latvia, Lithuania, and Estonia.

## Markets

- Latvia (LV)
- Lithuania (LT)
- Estonia (EE)

## Game Data

Game metadata (title, player count, play time, weight, categories, mechanics) is sourced from BoardGameGeek. Each listing includes the specific edition, publisher, and language of the copy being sold.

## Contact

Website: https://secondturn.games
Contact page: https://secondturn.games/contact
